templates.name: home
templates.title: Ledger · Home
templates.blurb: Billing flagship — the cashflow home: a KPI strip, a grouped transaction feed, and recent clients. Same app, same cast as the invoice screen.

templates.name: reports
templates.title: Ledger · Reports
templates.blurb: Billing flagship — Reports: a KPI strip, the invoiced-vs-collected revenue chart, and a live activity feed. Same cast, same restraint.

templates.name: invoices
templates.title: Ledger · Invoices
templates.blurb: Billing flagship — the invoices list: a Fill summary band over a filterable .datatable of invoices (client logo · amount · status · due). The third of three perfect screens.

templates.name: clients
templates.title: Ledger · Clients
templates.blurb: Billing flagship — the clients directory (the CRM archetype, rebuilt into the one Ledger app): a Fill summary band over a filterable .datatable of accounts with contact photos.

templates.name: expenses
templates.title: Ledger · Expenses
templates.blurb: Billing flagship — the expenses ledger: a Fill summary band over a filterable .datatable of spend (vendor mark · category · amount · status). Completes the Ledger menu.

templates.name: documents
templates.title: Ledger · Documents
templates.blurb: Billing flagship — Documents: the receipts & contracts vault as a media grid with an upload dropzone. Folds the old Studio surface into the one app.

templates.name: assistant
templates.title: Ledger · Assistant
templates.blurb: Billing flagship — the finance copilot: ask about overdue invoices, draft reminders, forecast cashflow. Folds the AI-assistant surface into the one app.

templates.name: plans
templates.title: Ledger · Plans & billing
templates.blurb: Billing flagship — Plans & billing: the org details, the current plan + upgrade, and notification preferences. Folds the Portal + Site pricing surfaces into the one app.
